_purpose: Append-only log of analogies minted by behavior:19-mint-analogy-on-demand when a learner is introduced to a concept and no matching analogy:* node exists for their MOS / role-tag. Read by cli-tool:propose-analogy to promote frequently-minted analogies into the canonical registry.

_schema.role_tag: short slug derived from MOS title (eod, netadmin, intel, nuke, logistics, ...); fallback to lowercased MOS code
_schema.mos: learner's MOS code (e.g. 25B, 35F, 88M) for cross-tag dedupe
_schema.concept: concept slug being analogized (matches concept:* registry id when possible)
_schema.analogy_text: the analogy as proposed and accepted (one or two sentences)
_schema.learner: github_username of the learner who accepted this mint

_analyze: Get-Content .github/knowledge-graph/data/analogy-pending.jsonl | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch '_meta' } | ConvertFrom-Json | Group-Object { $_.role_tag + ':' + $_.concept } | Sort-Object Count -Desc
_promotion_threshold: 2+ distinct learners with the same role_tag + concept
